colors.name: noir
colors.role: background — a dark room with the heating on, not black; every warmth reads against it

colors.name: champagne
colors.role: the accent: wordmark, degree numerals on cards, level lines, focus hairline, ::selection (10.7:1 on noir)

colors.name: cream
colors.role: primary body text and section titles (15.3:1)

colors.name: champagne-dim
colors.role: secondary text — champagne at 72% alpha composited over noir (6.1:1); carries eyebrows and every Korean gloss

colors.name: vermeil
colors.role: warm gold-copper — hairline rules, the large 36.5° display numeral, the bottle's collar, halo and liquid base (4.0:1 — large type and decoration only, never small text)

fonts.role: Latin hairline display — the wordmark, degree numerals, section titles; one weight, which is the point
all Hangul and all body text; Hangul in display settings falls through Italiana into it

texture: No raster imagery anywhere — deliberate. The bottle is SVG gradients (glass, liquid, vermeil collar, faceted stopper, warm halo, floor shadow) on a flat lifted-noir stage; over it hangs a hairline-framed canvas pane that re-renders the serialized SVG through a precomputed value-noise displacement field, two strip passes per frame — glass drawn by arithmetic. A static 112° cream sheen sits on the frame, a radial vermeil vignette warms the hero, and every rule on the page is a 1px champagne or vermeil hairline.

motion.name: ease-couture
motion.value: cubic-bezier(0.77, 0, 0.18, 1) — the clip-path wipes: patient in, patient out

motion.name: ease-air
motion.value: cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1) — fades and the pane's first appearance

motion.name: breath-intro
motion.value: wordmark opens to 45% air over 2600ms (cubic ease-out); scroll completes it within the first 0.7 viewport

motion.name: breath-lerp
motion.value: 0.055 per 60fps-normalized frame — the tracking drifts, it never snaps

motion.name: clip-reveal
motion.value: 950ms ease-couture, inset(0 100% 0 0) → inset(0), 90ms observer-batch stagger; card text follows +220ms

motion.name: refraction-drift
motion.value: noise field scrolls 0.22 cells/s down the rows, 0.17 cells/s across the columns — the ambient shimmer

motion.name: pointer-lerp
motion.value: 0.08 per 60fps-normalized frame — the lens slews like held glass, it does not chase

motion.name: energy attack / release
motion.value: 0.05 / 0.02 — the glass notices you slowly and forgets you even more slowly

motion.name: displacement caps
motion.value: ±7px horizontal, ±4px vertical (CSS px) — refraction, never distortion

motion.name: idle-shimmer
motion.value: after 2800ms of pointer silence, or always on touch: lissajous x 0.5+0.3·sin(0.00019t), y 0.42+0.24·sin(0.00031t+1.3), energy 0.3±0.12
